summary: Session 4 features fully tested: A) Referee accept/decline with conflict-aware warning dialog, B) Calendar availability strip (weekly) in Assign Dialog, C) Bulk assignment actions (Select All, Unassign All, Mark Complete, Clear), D) Payment batch processing (Select All Pending, Mark as Paid). All four features pass end-to-end. All required data-testids verified.

issues: The Radix UI Checkbox renders as a circle (○) rather than the more conventional square checkbox. Functional but visually looks like a radio button. Minor cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: GameAssignmentsTab correctly filters out completed games from bulk selection (only 4 checkboxes for non-completed games — game-4 has no checkbox). This is the correct behavior.

batchUnassignRefereesRecord in demoDataService.js correctly removes all gameAssignments for the given gameIds. The toast 'Referees Unassigned - Removed all referee assignments from 4 game(s).' confirms the action worked.
batchMarkPaymentsPaidRecord in demoDataService.js iterates paymentIds and sets status='paid'. Toast 'Payments Updated - 3 payment(s) marked as paid.' confirms it works.

AcceptConflictWarningDialog: conflict warning correctly triggers when a referee has another assignment at the same date/time (getRefereeStatus returns 'conflict'). Dialog closes correctly on both 'Cancel' and 'Accept Anyway' paths.
Feature D (payments): The manager sees ALL payments; referee only sees their own. 'Select all pending' checkbox only appears when pendingPayments.length > 0 — this is correct gating.

WeekCalendarStrip in AssignRefereeDialog: calendar strip appears below the selected referee card showing 7 days centered on the game date, with correct color coding (green=available, orange=assigned, grey=no data) and game date highlighted with blue ring.
test_credentials: manager@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager). referee@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee). Both on /login page.
mocked_api: MOCKED: All data via localStorage demoDataService.js (storage key: iwhistle_demo_data_v3, session key: iwhistle_session)
seed_data_creation: Tests injected a conflicting game assignment into localStorage to force the AcceptConflictWarningDialog to appear (game-5 date/time adjusted to match game-1, + assignment-conflict-test record for demo-referee). This injection is temporary per test run only. Also marked game-3 and game-1 as complete (as manager) during Feature D testing to generate pending payment records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Session 4 features are fully implemented and tested. Storage keys: iwhistle_demo_data_v3 (app data), iwhistle_session (auth session). IMPORTANT: When switching between referee/manager logins in playwright tests, must clear BOTH keys. Only clearing iwhistle_demo_data_v3 leaves the session active and blocks re-login. Login flow: /login → 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Manager/Referee'. Feature A: AcceptConflictWarningDialog only triggers when getRefereeStatus returns 'conflict' or 'unavailable'; demo-referee has no natural conflict for game-1 in seed data, so conflict must be injected to test this path. Feature D: Pending payments are created when a manager marks a game as 'complete' via the markGameAsCompleted action (not from seed data — seed has only 1 'paid' payment). Previous sessions (1-3) tested: login/dashboard/profile/calendar/settings/payments/manager tabs/conflict detection badges.

feature_test_results.A_decline_flow: PASS — DeclineAssignmentDialog opens with light theme (bg-white/border-slate-200), reason input works, 'Decline Assignment' confirms, dialog closes, 'Declined' badge appears on game card, toast shown.
feature_test_results.A_accept_no_conflict: PASS — Clicking Accept on game-1 (no conflict for demo-referee) goes directly to 'accepted' status without showing the conflict dialog.
feature_test_results.A_accept_conflict_dialog: PASS — When demo-referee has conflicting game (injected same date/time), AcceptConflictWarningDialog appears with 'Schedule Conflict Detected' header, conflict description (mentions conflicting game), 'Cancel' (accept-conflict-cancel-button) and 'Accept Anyway' (accept-conflict-anyway-button) buttons. Accept Anyway closes dialog and updates status to Accepted.
feature_test_results.B_calendar_strip: PASS — AssignRefereeDialog opens, clicking any referee card shows WeekCalendarStrip below with 'REFEREE SCHEDULE THIS WEEK' header, 7 day columns (Fri-Thu centered on game date), game date highlighted with blue ring, green=available/orange=assigned/grey=no data colors, and legend row.
feature_test_results.C_select_all: PASS — Select All checkbox selects all 4 non-completed games, bulk-actions-toolbar appears with '4 games selected', bulk-unassign-button and bulk-complete-button both visible.
feature_test_results.C_bulk_unassign: PASS — Clicking 'Unassign All Referees' removes all referee assignments, toolbar cleared, all 4 games show 'None Assigned', toast 'Referees Unassigned - Removed all referee assignments from 4 game(s).' shown.
feature_test_results.C_individual_checkboxes: PASS — Individual game checkboxes show correct counts (1 game selected, 2 games selected). Clear button dismisses toolbar.
feature_test_results.D_bulk_mark_paid: PASS — After marking games complete (creating pending payments), select-all-pending-payments-checkbox appears, clicking it selects all 3 pending, payments-bulk-actions-toolbar shows '3 payments selected', payments-bulk-mark-paid-button works, all payments marked paid, Pending stat drops to $0, toast 'Payments Updated - 3 payment(s) marked as paid.' shown.
feature_test_results.all_required_data_testids: PASS — accept-conflict-warning-dialog, accept-conflict-anyway-button, accept-conflict-cancel-button, decline-assignment-dialog, bulk-actions-toolbar, select-all-games-checkbox, bulk-unassign-button, bulk-complete-button, payments-bulk-actions-toolbar, payments-bulk-mark-paid-button, select-all-pending-payments-checkbox — ALL verified present and functional.
